name: UserMapRequest
description: UserMapRequest schema from Amplitude User Mapping API

mapping.description: An array of user mapping objects, each mapping a global_user_id to one or more user_ids.

global_user_id.description: The primary user ID that other identities will be mapped to.

user_id.description: The user ID to map to the global_user_id.

unmap.description: When true, removes the mapping instead of creating it.
